刚毕业的大学生王臣因彩票中奖而面临生死考验，且看身为普通人的他如何破局。
渡过难关后，他又幸得影视穿越系统加持，能穿越到各个精彩纷呈的世界冒险。
“弥补遗憾，镇杀奸恶”就是王臣的宗旨，他也在不断的穿越中越来越强大，那么踏入超凡的王臣又会给他的世界带来怎样的变化呢？
暂定以下电影世界《釜山行》，《暮光之城》，《僵尸先生》，《霍比特人》，可能变动。
（穿越世界均为电影世界，主世界剧情也不少。前几章节奏慢）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1079f35f14a7b787c68cc9a0a85d4021~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"嫁纱涉川","author_id":"","book_id":"7437056226954857497","book_name":"影视，无限穿越的传奇","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2159人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7437056257657471513","read_count":"2159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"813932"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"366","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0a048ee0d60de9b50332c349767a00cb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779289454&x-signature=9jsV4x3zZr5NWat1DMoxtsoRW6Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4328150388445836","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212304145401A0677F2AE1DEF53B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun
